tagline: Modern furniture for the way you actually live.

hero.heading: Furniture, considered.
hero.subheading: Pieces selected for craft, longevity, and quiet design. Visit our Burbank showroom and find something worth keeping.

about.heading: 97 reviews. 4.9 stars. The Burbank showroom for thoughtful design.
paragraphs: Urban Habitat is a small, owner-run furniture studio. We curate every piece — sofas, dining, beds, lighting — for materials that age well and forms that don't go out of style.
Walk in. Touch the wood. Sit on the sofa. We'll talk about your space, suggest combinations, and never push. The right piece finds its room.

services.title: Sofas & Sectionals
services.description: Hand-built frames, down or foam fills, performance fabrics. Configurable in any size.

services.title: Dining Tables
services.description: Solid walnut, white oak, and ash. American-made, built to outlast the trend cycle.

services.title: Beds & Bedroom
services.description: Platform beds, headboards, dressers — soft lines, real wood, no veneer shortcuts.

services.title: Lighting
services.description: Floor, table, and pendant lighting from designers we trust. Hand-picked for the showroom.

services.title: Design Consult
services.description: Stuck on a room? Bring photos and dimensions — we'll plan it out together. No pressure to buy.

services.title: Local Delivery
services.description: White-glove delivery and setup in greater LA. We bring it in, place it, and take the boxes away.

reviews.name: Emma R.
reviews.text: After months of fast-furniture regret, finally found a real shop. The sofa we bought feels like an heirloom.

reviews.name: James W.
reviews.text: Owner walked us through every option, no upsell. Delivery was on time and the assembly was perfect.

reviews.name: Priya L.
reviews.text: Quality and taste you don't find at the chain stores. Worth every penny. Will be back for the bedroom.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Urban Habitat, 1055 N Victory Pl, Burbank, CA

seo.title: Urban Habitat — Modern Furniture Showroom in Burbank, CA
seo.description: Curated modern furniture — sofas, dining, beds, lighting — for the way you actually live. Visit our Burbank showroom or call (818) 641-1143.
